name: Cream Cheese and Garlic Dip with Pita Toasts (Low Fat)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, mix together cream cheese, mayonnaise, lemon juice, garlic, onion, dill, and salt substitute. Add Tabasco® to taste.
2. Cut the top off the bell pepper and remove seeds. Spoon the dip into the hollowed-out bell pepper and cover with plastic wrap. Chill while making the pita toasts.
3. Pita Toasts: Cut each round of whole-wheat pita bread into 4 equal wedges. Toast until crisp, then open each wedge and dust the inside lightly with garlic powder. Arrange on a platter with the dip. Makes 12 wedges.
